label: 烘焙带色物体
description: 把一个由多个上色 part 组成的物体整体烘成单个多材质 GLB（颜色按 part 内嵌进 mesh），返回 filename(<sha>.glb)。场景里用 g_mesh(filename=<sha>.glb) 单实例引用即可保留多种颜色——前提是引用它的 g_part 不要再上 material（否则 viewer 会用 link 材质覆盖内嵌色）。输入 geometry 里所有 part 语句都会被烘进同一物体：每个 part 解析 shape(ref)+material(ref→rgba，缺省灰)+origin/rpy。区别于 g_bake_part（烘单个形状成纯几何 OBJ、无颜色）。
description-en: Bake an object made of multiple colored parts into a single multi-material GLB (per-part colors embedded into the mesh), returning filename(<sha>.glb). Reference it once via g_mesh(filename=<sha>.glb) in the scene to keep multiple colors — provided the referencing g_part carries NO material (otherwise the viewer overrides embedded colors with the link material). Every part() in the input geometry is baked into the same object: each part resolves shape(ref)+material(ref→rgba, gray fallback)+origin/rpy. Unlike g_bake_part (which bakes a single shape into a colorless OBJ).

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 由多个上色 part 组成的物体子图（PART A 阶段2 产物：每个 part = shape + material + 位姿）。
inputs.description-en: Object subgraph made of colored parts (PART A phase-2 output: each part = shape + material + pose).

outputs.name: filename
outputs.label: Mesh 文件名
outputs.description: 带色物体的内容寻址文件名 <sha>.glb；接 g_mesh.filename 在场景里引用。
outputs.description-en: Content-addressed filename <sha>.glb of the colored object; wire into g_mesh.filename to reference it in the scene.

outputs.name: sha256
outputs.label: sha256
outputs.description: 烘焙物体的 sha256 内容指纹（含每个 part 的形状/颜色/位姿）。
outputs.description-en: sha256 content fingerprint of the baked object (includes each part's shape/color/pose).

outputs.name: vertexCount
outputs.label: 顶点数
outputs.description: 烘焙 GLB 的总顶点数。
outputs.description-en: Total vertex count of the baked GLB.

outputs.name: triangleCount
outputs.label: 三角面数
outputs.description: 烘焙 GLB 的总三角面数。
outputs.description-en: Total triangle count of the baked GLB.

outputs.name: cacheHit
outputs.label: 缓存命中
outputs.description: 本次烘焙是否命中进程内缓存。
outputs.description-en: Whether this bake hit the in-process cache.

outputs.name: bbox_min
outputs.label: 包围盒最小角
outputs.description: 烘焙物体的局部 AABB 最小角 [x,y,z]（米）。接 g_mesh.bbox_min。
outputs.description-en: Local AABB min corner [x,y,z] (meters) of the baked object. Wire into g_mesh.bbox_min.

outputs.name: bbox_max
outputs.label: 包围盒最大角
outputs.description: 烘焙物体的局部 AABB 最大角 [x,y,z]（米）。接 g_mesh.bbox_max。
outputs.description-en: Local AABB max corner [x,y,z] (meters) of the baked object. Wire into g_mesh.bbox_max.

outputs.name: size
outputs.label: 尺寸
outputs.description: 烘焙物体三轴尺寸 [sx,sy,sz]（米）= bbox_max - bbox_min。

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 透传输入 geometry，便于链式接线。
outputs.description-en: Pass-through of the input geometry for chaining.

outputs.name: note
outputs.label: 提示
outputs.description: 非错误说明（烘焙结果、引用方式提醒等）。
outputs.description-en: Non-error note (bake result, referencing reminder, etc.).

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: 烘焙失败 / 缺 baker / 缺 part 时的错误说明。
outputs.description-en: Error message on bake failure / missing baker / no parts.
